start.speaker: System
start.text: Welcome to ROI. Please select your starting level from the Map.

lvl1_scene1.speaker: Adam/Eve
lvl1_scene1.text: Yay! I got ₹5000 as my pocket money this month.

lvl1_father_advice.speaker: Father
lvl1_father_advice.text: That's great, but remember—you shouldn't spend it all. You should save a part of it in an RD, a recurring deposit. It will help you in the future.

lvl1_rd_explain.speaker: Father
lvl1_rd_explain.text: An RD, or Recurring Deposit, is a way of saving money regularly. You deposit a fixed amount every month for a certain period. The bank gives you interest, so your total grows. It also builds a habit of disciplined saving.

choices.text: So if I save a little every month, I'll have more later?

lvl1_choice_month.speaker: System
lvl1_choice_month.text: You have ₹5000 this month. What would you like to do? Choose how much you want to allocate.

choices.mentorText: Excellent! You are building a solid foundation.
It's a start, but remember your goals.
Living for the moment... but what about next month?

lvl1_scene2.speaker: Friends
lvl1_scene2.text: Hey! We're going for a party this weekend, are you coming?

lvl1_scene3.speaker: Friends
lvl1_scene3.text: By the way, we're planning a trip after a few months! You should start saving from now so you can join us. Do you want to start saving for the trip?

lvl1_scene4.speaker: Teacher
lvl1_scene4.text: You have been assigned a project. Make sure you complete it on time. (You'll need to buy materials for ₹500). This is a NEED.

lvl1_summary.speaker: System
lvl1_summary.text: Time period completed. Here is your summary. Let's see if you can go on the trip!

lvl1_trip_outcome.speaker: Adam/Eve
lvl1_trip_outcome.text: The trip is here! Can I afford it?

lvl1_result_logic.speaker: System
lvl1_result_logic.text: Lesson Complete. You've learned how pocket money management works! Now promoting to Level 2.

lvl2_scene1.speaker: Adam/Eve
lvl2_scene1.text: I just received my first salary — ₹50,000! This feels unreal.

lvl2_celebration.speaker: Friend
lvl2_celebration.text: That's huge! You have to celebrate this!

lvl2_father_intro.speaker: Father
lvl2_father_intro.text: Hello beta, got your first salary? I'm proud of you. But now comes the important part—managing it. Try dividing it into three parts: Needs, Wants, and Savings.

choices.text: What's the best way to balance it?

lvl2_choice_month.speaker: System
lvl2_choice_month.text: You received ₹50,000 this month. How would you like to use it? (Apply the 50-30-20 rule!)

choices.mentorText: Perfect! This is the gold standard for financial health.
Oops! You'll hit a wall very soon with this approach.

lvl2_emi_trap.speaker: Friend
lvl2_emi_trap.text: A new phone just launched. You can get it on ₹5,000 EMI. Should I go for it?

lvl2_father_emi_warning.speaker: Father
lvl2_father_emi_warning.text: Small payments feel easy, but they continue every month. They reduce the money you have available.

lvl2_needs_quiz.speaker: System
lvl2_needs_quiz.text: Let's try a quick activity. Select whether each is a NEED or a WANT.

lvl2_needs_quiz_2.speaker: Activity
lvl2_needs_quiz_2.text: Movie night, New headphones, Weekend outing?

final_summary.speaker: System
final_summary.text: Level 2 complete. You've mastered needs, wants, and EMI traps. Return to the map to see your progress!
